{{Quote|How did I lose my arm? A stormtrooper tapped my shoulder with a force pike...|Char'Shen Larcuna|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>}}
'''Char'Shen Larcuna''' was a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. When an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] tapped Larcuna's arm with a [[Force pike/Legends|force pike]], the resulting wound necessitated the [[Limb/Legends|limb's]] amputation; this was a testament to the power of such a weapon.<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology" />
